title: vandellia strigosa
intro: Vandellia strigosa is a perennial plant found in tropical regions, specifically in the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Menispermaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat snake bites and other poisonous stings due to its antivenom and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vandellia strigosa include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include its use in making tinctures, decoctions, and ointments, which are applied topically to treat wounds and skin conditions.
